name: Uptime Kuma With Mysql
tagline: Uptime Kuma is a monitoring tool for tracking the status and performance of your applications in real-time.
description:
Uptime Kuma is a monitoring tool for tracking the status and performance of your applications in real-time.

Docs: https://github.com/louislam/uptime-kuma?tab=readme-ov-file?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:2
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ:-Etc/UTC}
    volumes:
      - uptime-kuma-data:/app/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - extra/healthcheck
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42132:3001
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8
    environment:
      - MYSQL_USER=u9ca16f6a9b
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=cb1273a86cf1cba124af941f2973bb43
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=544a23f4aaf304c56746ea27ebe841ac
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-uptime-kuma-db}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - mysqladmin
        - ping
        - -h
        - 127.0.0.1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    volumes:
      - mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  uptime-kuma-data: null
  mysql-data: null
